core_payload.content:
# N-Infinity Project

## 1. Role
N-Infinity Project will become the long-horizon control-plane program for a denser, more visible, and more economically disciplined autonomous swarm.

## 2. Future Project Contract
The project will grow a richer iteration fabric where planning, mining, refinement, stewardship, review, repository execution, and promotion reinforce one another through explicit lane budgets, visible assignment maps, stronger evidence thresholds, and calmer baton exchange between lanes.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Autonomous service will widen only when proof, cooldown, rollback, and budget law are mature enough to support it. The swarm program will remain governed even as it becomes more continuous and more capable.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
N-Infinity Project supports To Dig Deep by making autonomous scale answerable to explicit law, evidence, and economic discipline.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N-Infinity Project defines the future control-plane program for a denser autonomous swarm: richer iteration fabric, explicit lane budgets, stronger evidence thresholds, calmer baton exchange, and more visible assignment maps across planning, mining, refinement, review, and repository execution.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
